_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Identify ways to lead and motivate people to adopt AI solutions through cultural, organizational, or other types of change.
reference_document_element_description: Execute bias audits on AI systems in development and production, documenting methodology, findings, and recommended interventions.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI AG domain. AG-T-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-018 (AI, cosine: 0.594), LS-A-001 (LS, cosine: 0.591).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.1/10 (raw 0.308). Shared vocabulary: [ai]. DCWF-only terms [adopt, change, cultural, identify, lead, motivate] vs WIDAI-only terms [audits, bias, development, documenting, execute, findings] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.880 (P=0.879, R=0.881). Balanced P/R — the 19-word DCWF element and 16-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Identify ways to lead and motivate people to adopt AI solutions through cultural" and "Execute bias audits on AI systems in development and production, documenting met" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.610 > STS 0.308 (gap +0.302). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ai] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.5%. Shared tokens: [ai]. DCWF-only: [adopt, change, cultural, identify, lead, motivate]. WIDAI-only: [audits, bias, development, documenting, execute, findings].
